markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between Sardine.ai and GrowthX Labs for content marketing and growth strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/kaxzhzJkgwswYY9kCHQApR7WoxxYKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX Labs offers a comprehensive AI-powered content strategy and execution service, focusing on organic growth through high-volume, quality content creation (50-100k words/month).](https://fathom.video/share/kaxzhzJkgwswYY9kCHQApR7WoxxYKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [Their approach combines AI workflows with expert human oversight, emphasizing rapid content production, SEO optimization, and iterative improvement.](https://fathom.video/share/kaxzhzJkgwswYY9kCHQApR7WoxxYKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Sardine.ai has potential for significant organic traffic growth; currently only 4 out of 69 blog posts receive \>10 monthly US visitors.](https://fathom.video/share/kaxzhzJkgwswYY9kCHQApR7WoxxYKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=875.0)
  - [GrowthX Labs' pricing is transparent (10-20 cents/word) with a low-risk 12-week pilot period, next available start date: April 28th.](https://fathom.video/share/kaxzhzJkgwswYY9kCHQApR7WoxxYKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=1218.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Labs' Approach and Technology

  - [Utilizes AI workflow-as-code engine for efficient content creation and strategy development](https://fathom.video/share/kaxzhzJkgwswYY9kCHQApR7WoxxYKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
  - [Combines AI tools with expert human oversight (e.g., former TechCrunch editor-in-chief)](https://fathom.video/share/kaxzhzJkgwswYY9kCHQApR7WoxxYKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Focuses on three angles: personas, jobs-to-be-done, and mindshare competitors](https://fathom.video/share/kaxzhzJkgwswYY9kCHQApR7WoxxYKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
  - [Emphasizes rapid content production (5-10 pieces/week) with iterative improvement](https://fathom.video/share/kaxzhzJkgwswYY9kCHQApR7WoxxYKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
  - [Employs programmatic SEO and opportunity identification](https://fathom.video/share/kaxzhzJkgwswYY9kCHQApR7WoxxYKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)

### Content Strategy and Execution

  - [Primarily focuses on website content (comparison pages, blogs, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/kaxzhzJkgwswYY9kCHQApR7WoxxYKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=772.0)
  - [Aims for 50-100k words published monthly](https://fathom.video/share/kaxzhzJkgwswYY9kCHQApR7WoxxYKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=981.0)
  - [Identifies keyword opportunities and creates content to rank for high-value, low-difficulty terms](https://fathom.video/share/kaxzhzJkgwswYY9kCHQApR7WoxxYKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
  - [Optimizes for organic traffic growth and becoming the "best answer" for relevant queries](https://fathom.video/share/kaxzhzJkgwswYY9kCHQApR7WoxxYKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)
  - [Includes content repurposing and social distribution in later stages](https://fathom.video/share/kaxzhzJkgwswYY9kCHQApR7WoxxYKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)

### Sardine.ai's Current Content Situation

  - [\~120 indexed pages, with 69 blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/kaxzhzJkgwswYY9kCHQApR7WoxxYKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=875.0)
  - [Only 4 blog posts receiving \>10 monthly US visitors](https://fathom.video/share/kaxzhzJkgwswYY9kCHQApR7WoxxYKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Significant potential for organic traffic growth through targeted content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/kaxzhzJkgwswYY9kCHQApR7WoxxYKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)

### GrowthX Labs' Service Offering

  - [Full-service content team at a fraction of the cost of in-house headcount](https://fathom.video/share/kaxzhzJkgwswYY9kCHQApR7WoxxYKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=981.0)
  - [12-week pilot period for low-risk engagement](https://fathom.video/share/kaxzhzJkgwswYY9kCHQApR7WoxxYKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Transparent pricing (10-20 cents per word)](https://fathom.video/share/kaxzhzJkgwswYY9kCHQApR7WoxxYKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Includes content strategy development, creation, publishing, and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/kaxzhzJkgwswYY9kCHQApR7WoxxYKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)

### Long-term Growth Strategy

  - [Phase 1: Establish high-quality content cadence and prove ROI](https://fathom.video/share/kaxzhzJkgwswYY9kCHQApR7WoxxYKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=356.0)
  - [Phase 2: Convert traffic to engaged audience and implement micro-conversions](https://fathom.video/share/kaxzhzJkgwswYY9kCHQApR7WoxxYKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=1379.0)
  - [Phase 3: Develop lead magnets and follow-up campaigns to convert audience into opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/kaxzhzJkgwswYY9kCHQApR7WoxxYKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX Labs to send meeting recording and sample SOW to Aditya](https://fathom.video/share/kaxzhzJkgwswYY9kCHQApR7WoxxYKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=1218.0)
  - [Aditya to review materials with Sardine.ai's marketing and growth teams](https://fathom.video/share/kaxzhzJkgwswYY9kCHQApR7WoxxYKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)
  - [Follow-up meeting to be scheduled if needed, with specific questions from Sardine.ai team](https://fathom.video/share/kaxzhzJkgwswYY9kCHQApR7WoxxYKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=1248.0)
  - [Sardine.ai to decide on engagement, potentially starting April 28th (spot being held)](https://fathom.video/share/kaxzhzJkgwswYY9kCHQApR7WoxxYKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=1461.0)
  - [If proceeding, GrowthX Labs to prepare a proposal for slightly higher volume than 50k words/month](https://fathom.video/share/kaxzhzJkgwswYY9kCHQApR7WoxxYKJks?tab=summary&timestamp=1278.0)
